headers.value: default-src 'self';font-src 'self' data: *;script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' fonts.googleapis.com https://www.gstatic.com *.firebaseapp.com;img-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' *.gorjana.com *.shopify.com javascript: ;style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' *;connect-src 'self' *; frame-ancestors https://admin.shopify.com https://*.myshopify.com;
